mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRD_WORK_RESULT ( PLANT_CD, RESULT_NO, WO_ID, RESULT_DT, SHIFT, WORKER_ID, WORKCENTER_CD, EQUIPMENT_CD, ITEM_CD, PROD_QTY, GOOD_QTY, DEFECT_QTY, START_DTM, END_DTM, WORK_TIME, SETUP_TIME, DOWN_TIME, LOT_NO, RESULT_STATUS, RESULT_RMK, REG_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{request.plantCd}, #{resultNo}, #{request.woId}, #{request.resultDt}, #{request.shift}, #{request.workerId}, #{request.workcenterCd}, #{request.equipmentCd}, #{request.itemCd}, #{request.prodQty}, #{request.goodQty}, COALESCE(#{request.defectQty}, 0), #{request.startDtm}, #{request.endDtm}, #{request.workTime}, #{request.setupTime}, #{request.downTime}, #{request.lotNo}, COALESCE(#{request.resultStatus}, '완료'), #{request.resultRmk}, #{regUserId} )
